jurisdiction: Municipio de Los Cabos, Baja California Sur — Direccion de Obras Publicas y Desarrollo Urbano
permit_notes: Public project permit process — 23 weeks (longer than residential as expected for a government-commissioned building in BCS). Inter-agency coordination required: CONAGUA (water/sanitary connection) and CFE (electrical service + solar net metering). No corrections received — clean first submission. Permit process duration confirms public project requires longer timeline than residential per scope-of-work.json Phase 6.

additional_authorizations.type: Potable water and sanitary discharge connection
additional_authorizations.notes: Municipal site — direct connection to existing infrastructure

additional_authorizations.type: Electrical service connection including solar net metering
additional_authorizations.notes: Net metering agreement for solar system approved
